response:
Here are comprehensive pytest unit tests for the `validate_password` function:

```python
import pytest


def validate_password(pw: str) -> bool:
    if len(pw) < 8:
        return False
    has_upper = any(c.isupper() for c in pw)
    has_lower = any(c.islower() for c in pw)
    has_digit = any(c.isdigit() for c in pw)
    return has_upper and has_lower and has_digit


# Happy path tests
def test_valid_password():
    """Test valid passwords with all requirements met."""
    assert validate_password("ValidPass123") == True
    assert validate_password("Another1Password") == True
    assert validate_password("Test1234") == True  # Exactly 8 chars
    assert validate_password("Abcdefg1") == True  # Mixed case with digit


def test_valid_password_with_special_chars():
    """Test valid passwords that include special characters."""
    assert validate_password("Valid@Pass123") == True
    assert validate_password("Test_1234!") == True
    assert validate_password("Password#1") == True


# Edge cases
def test_exactly_8_characters():
    """Test passwords with exactly 8 characters."""
    assert validate_password("Abcdefg1") == True  # Valid
    assert validate_password("ABCDEFG1") == False  # No lowercase
    assert validate_password("abcdefg1") == False  # No uppercase
    assert validate_password("Abcdefgh") == False  # No digit


def test_long_passwords():
    """Test very long passwords."""
    assert validate_password("A" * 100 + "b1") == True
    assert validate_password("ValidPass123" * 10) == True


def test_password_with_whitespace():
    """Test passwords containing whitespace."""
    assert validate_password("Valid 123") == True  # Space in middle
    assert validate_password(" Valid123") == True  # Leading space
    assert validate_password("Valid123 ") == True  # Trailing space
    assert validate_password("  Valid123  ") == True  # Multiple spaces


def test_password_with_unicode():
    """Test passwords with Unicode characters."""
    assert validate_password("Valid123É") == True  # Unicode uppercase
    assert validate_password("Valid123é") == True  # Unicode lowercase
    assert validate_password("Valid123α") == True  # Greek letter


# Error cases / Invalid passwords
def test_too_short_password():
    """Test passwords shorter than 8 characters."""
    assert validate_password("") == False  # Empty string
    assert validate_password("A") == False  # Single char
    assert validate_password("Abc123") == False  # 6 chars
    assert validate_password("Abcdef1") == False  # 7 chars (one short)


def test_missing_uppercase():
    """Test passwords missing uppercase letters."""
    assert validate_password("lowercase123") == False
    assert validate_password("12345678") == False  # Only digits
    assert validate_password("abcdefgh1") == False


def test_missing_lowercase():
    """Test passwords missing lowercase letters."""
    assert validate_password("UPPERCASE123") == False
    assert validate_password("ABCDEFGH1") == False
    assert validate_password("12345678A") == False  # Digits + uppercase only


def test_missing_digit():
    """Test passwords missing digits."""
    assert validate_password("NoDigits") == False
    assert validate_password("UpperCaseOnly") == False
    assert validate_password("MixedCaseButNoDigit") == False


def test_only_one_requirement_met():
    """Test passwords that only meet one requirement."""
    assert validate_password("abcdefgh") == False  # Only lowercase
    assert validate_password("ABCDEFGH") == False  # Only uppercase
    assert validate_password("12345678") == False  # Only digits


def test_two_requirements_met():
    """Test passwords that meet two requirements but not all three."""
    assert validate_password("abcdefghij") == False  # Lowercase only
    assert validate_password("ABCDEFGHIJ") == False  # Uppercase only
    assert validate_password("ABCDEFGH1") == False  # Uppercase + digit, no lowercase
    assert validate_password("abcdefgh1") == False  # Lowercase + digit, no uppercase
    assert validate_password("Abcdefgh") == False  # Mixed case, no digit


def test_none_requirements_met():
    """Test passwords that meet none of the requirements."""
    assert validate_password("") ==
